targets.name: Impulsive Fauvist Student of the Ring

passives.desc: Before hitting, if target does not have [Laceration], inflict +3 [Laceration] Count (once per turn per enemy)
passives.name: Intense Primary Color - Rouge

passives.desc:
On Hit with a Skill, inflict 1 [BearClawWound]

Gain 1 [Enhancement] next turn for every 4 [BearClawWound] inflicted (2 times per turn)
passives.name: Le Fauvisme - Masque de Chien

passives.desc: When this unit or an ally is hit, gain 1 [AttackUp] next turn (once per Skill, 3 times per turn)
passives.name: Welling Inspiration

passives.desc: When this unit is killed, inflict 3 [BearClawWound] on 2 random enemies
passives.name: Final Brushstroke

passives.desc: On death, give +2 E.G.O resource of the least-owned Affinity
passives.name: Remnant of Art

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] If target does not have [BearClawWound], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ ([Laceration] + [Sinking]), Coin Power +1
skills.name: Wildstroke

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] If target does not have [BearClawWound], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ ([Laceration] + [Sinking]), Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] If target has 5+ Mauled Color, convert all Coins on this Skill to [SuperCoin]s
[DefeatDuel]
- Damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target
- On Hit, does not trigger [Sinking] effects on the target
skills.name: Dessin Rapide

skills.desc:
Deal +10% damage for every 3 Mauled Color on target (max 30%)
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ ([Laceration] + [Sinking]), Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] At less than 50% HP, or if target has 5+ Mauled Color, use Coin 3 an additional time and convert all Coins on this Skill to [SuperCoin]s
[DefeatDuel]
- Damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target
- On Hit, does not trigger [Sinking] effects on the target

skills.name: Finishing Touch

[DuelCounter]

skills.name: Partial Rework

passives.desc: Turn Start: Gain 2 [Protection] for every allied Fauvist Student of the Ring - If this unit used "Critique" in this Encounter, gain 2 [Protection] and heal 5 SP instead starting from the next turn (At lower than -15 SP, double the SP-healing effect) - If there are no allied Fauvist Students of the Ring, gain 2 [Vulnerable] and reduce this unit's SP down to 0 instead Immediately Before Getting Hit by a Skill that has 1 Atk Weight, if there is an allied Student of the Ring, have the said unit take the attack instead (2 times per turn, excluding Assist Units) Turn End of the turn this unit used "Critique": If an allied Fauvist Student of the Ring was defeated in this Encounter, refill its vacancy with the same Student unit - Every Turn Start: The Student that refilled the vacancy due to this effect gains (# of allies defeated in this Encounter) [Vulnerable] and [AttackDown] (max 10 each)
passives.name: The Ring's Docent of Fauvism

passives.desc: Combat End: Inflict 1 [IntenseColors] next turn to Sinners that have [BearClawWound], [EagleClawWound], and [BoldBrushstrokes] simultaneously - If target has 3+/6+/9+ [BearClawWound] and [EagleClawWound] each, inflict 2/3/4 [IntenseColors] instead (amount inflicted is based on the effect that has the least Stack)
passives.name: Le Fauvisme - Couleurs Sauvages

passives.desc: Turn Start: Randomly apply [AttackUp] and [DefenseUp] to allied Fauvist Students of the Ring equal to the number of turns (including the current turn) each unit has survived, respectively (max 5) Turn End: If an allied Student is Staggered, recover them from Stagger - All Attack Type and Affinity Resistance for the Students who recovered from Stagger due to this effect becomes "Fatal" for the next turn Turn End: If a Student is in Panic, heal their SP up to 45
passives.name: Mentorship

passives.desc: Gain the effects of [PanicChangeLock] Turn End: If this unit is in Panic, reset SP to 20 At 70%- HP, gain a new pattern - Remove all effects other than those exclusive to this unit - First Turn Start of the new pattern: Gain [FaubismWolfMask] and heal up to 45 SP
passives.name: Casque de Fauve - Empreinte Vitale

skills.desc: Final Power +1 for every 6 ([Laceration] + [Sinking]) on target (max 2)
skills.name: Expression of Primary Colors

skills.desc: Final Power +1 for every 6 ([Laceration] + [Sinking]) on target (max 2)
skills.name: Vehement Overpainting

skills.name: Le Fauvisme - Déchaînement Primal

descs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Reuse this Coin (max 2 times)
- On Hit after losing a Clash, Reuse this Coin (max once instead)
- Does not trigger if target has equipped Defense Skills

skills.desc: [CantChangeTarget] [WhenUse] - Clash Power +2 for every type of negative effect on target (max 12) - If target has [IntenseColors], Clash Power +6 and deal +100% damage · If target has equipped Defense Skills while having [IntenseColors], Clash Power +6 and deal -90% damage instead [DefeatDuel] - Damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target - On Hit, does not trigger [Sinking] effects on the target
skills.name: Critique

passives.desc:
In the turn this unit uses a powerful attack, Min & Max Speed +15

Take -30% damage from Unopposed Attacks
Deal +30% damage with Unopposed Attacks
- If the Slot targeted by this unit's Unopposed Attack has 2+ [Aggro], reduce the increased damage from this effect by 5% per [Aggro] Stack (min 0%)

On Clash Lose, gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] (5 per turn)
- At Turn End, or at Attack End of a Skill that hit a Sinner, the [AttackDmgUp] effect gained with this effect expires
passives.name: Rufo, a Docent of The Ring's School of Fauvism

passives.desc: Combat End: Inflict 1 [IntenseColors] next turn to Sinners that have [BearClawWound], [EagleClawWound], and [BoldBrushstrokes] simultaneously - If target has 3+/6+/9+ [BearClawWound] and [EagleClawWound] each, inflict 2/3/4 [IntenseColors] instead (amount inflicted is based on the effect that has the least Stack)
passives.name: Le Fauvisme - Couleurs Sauvages

passives.desc: Turn Start: Gain 8 [Protection] - Gain 2 fewer [Protection] at Turn Start for every type of negative effect on this unit - On Clash Lose using "Burst Forth the Pulsing Crimson under Your Skin" Skill, gain 2 [Vulnerable] from this effect instead for the next turn Gain 1 Defense Level each time this unit is hit by a Skill Coin (max 20 per turn) - Turn End: Defense Level gained due to this effect expires - On Clash Lose using "Burst Forth the Pulsing Crimson under Your Skin" Skill, lose 1 Defense Level each time this unit is hit by a Skill Coin instead for the next turn (max 20; expires at Turn End)
passives.name: Le Fauvisme - Masque de Loup : Résurgence de la Sauvagerie

passives.desc: Gain the effects of [PanicChangeLock] Turn End: If this unit is in Panic, reset SP to 30 At 35%- HP, convert [FaubismWolfMask] into [FaubismWolfMaskBlooded], and heal up to 45 SP
passives.name: Le Fauvisme - Maximum Paint Tolerance Dose

Final Power +1 for every 6 ([Laceration] + [Sinking]) on target (max 2)

skills.name: Impassioned Overpainting

skills.desc: Final Power +1 for every 6 ([Laceration] + [Sinking]) on target (max 4) [WhenUse] If target has 3+ types of negative effect, convert all Coins on this Skill to [SuperCoin]s [DefeatDuel] - Deal -75% damage - Damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target - On Hit, does not trigger [Sinking] effects on the target
skills.name: Le Fauvisme - Déchaînement Brutal

skills.desc: Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed [WhenUse] Final Power +1 and deal +10% damage for every type of negative effect on the main target (max 6 and 60% respectively) [WinDuel] - Deal +10% damage for every type of negative effect on each target (max 60% against each target) [DefeatDuel] - Deal -75% damage - Inflict 2/3 less Stacks of [BearClawWound] and [EagleClawWound] with this Skill's effect (rounded up) - Damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target - On Hit, does not trigger [Sinking] effects on the target
skills.name: The Thrill of Inspiration

skills.desc: [WideAreaRampage] Prioritizes targets that have [IntenseColors] This Skill does not trigger Defense Skills (excluding Clashable Guard) Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed [WhenUse] - Final Power +1 for every type of negative effect on the main target (max 6) - If the main target has [IntenseColors], Clash Power +6 - If target has [IntenseColors], deal +100% damage (against each target separately) · If target has equipped Defense Skills while having [IntenseColors], deal -90% damage instead [WinDuel] - Deal +10% damage for every type of negative effect on target (max 60%, against each target separately) [DefeatDuel] - Gain 5 [AttackDmgDown] and 5 [Paralysis] - Damage from this Skill does not Stagger the target - On Hit, does not trigger [Sinking] effects on the target [EndSkill] End this turn
skills.name: Burst Forth the Pulsing Crimson under Your Skin.
